34 #define DECLARE_SOA_METADATA() \
35  template <typename T> \
36  struct MetadataTrait { \
37  using metadata = std::void_t<T>; \
38  };
39 
40 #define DECLARE_SOA_ITERATOR_METADATA() \
41  template <typename IT> \
42  requires(o2::soa::is_soa_iterator_v<IT>) struct MetadataTrait<IT> { \
43  using metadata = typename MetadataTrait<typename IT::parent_t>::metadata; \
44  };
45 
46 namespace o2::framework
47 {
48 struct OriginEnc {
49  static constexpr size_t size = 4;
50  uint32_t value;
51  consteval OriginEnc(uint32_t v) : value{v}
52  {
53  }
54  consteval OriginEnc(std::string_view in) : value{0}
55  {
56  for (auto i = 0U; i < (size < in.size() ? size : in.size()); ++i) {
57  value |= ((uint8_t)in[i]) << (8 * i);
58  }
59  }
60  operator const char*() const
61  {
62  return (const char*)(&value);
63  }
64 
65  consteval operator o2::header::DataOrigin()
66  {
67  return o2::header::DataOrigin{value};
68  }
69 
70  consteval OriginEnc(OriginEnc const& other) = default;
71  consteval OriginEnc(OriginEnc&& other) noexcept = default;
72  consteval OriginEnc& operator=(OriginEnc const& other) = default;
73  consteval OriginEnc& operator=(OriginEnc&& other) noexcept = default;
74 };
75 } // namespace o2::framework
76 
77 template <>
78 struct fmt::formatter<o2::framework::OriginEnc> {
79  char presentation = 's';
80  constexpr auto parse(format_parse_context& ctx)
81  {
82  auto it = ctx.begin(), end = ctx.end();
83  if (it != end && (*it == 's')) {
84  presentation = *it++;
85  }
86 
87  // Check if reached the end of the range:
88  if (it != end && *it != '}') {
89  throw format_error("invalid pick format");
90  }
91 
92  // Return an iterator past the end of the parsed range:
93  return it;
94  }
95 
96  template <typename FormatContext>
97  auto format(o2::framework::OriginEnc const& origin, FormatContext& ctx)
98  {
99  return fmt::format_to(ctx.out(), "{}", (std::string_view)origin);
100  }
101 };
102 
103 namespace o2::aod
104 {
105 DECLARE_SOA_METADATA();
106 }

108 namespace o2::soa
109 {
110 
111 struct Binding {
112  void const* ptr = nullptr;
113  size_t hash = 0;
114 
115  template <typename T>
116  void bind(T const* table)
117  {
118  ptr = table;
119  hash = o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>();
120  }
121 
122  template <typename T>
123  T const* get() const
124  {
125  if (hash == o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>()) {
126  return static_cast<T const*>(ptr);
127  }
128  return nullptr;
129  }
130 };
131 
132 void accessingInvalidIndexFor(const char* getter);
133 void dereferenceWithWrongType();
134 void missingFilterDeclaration(int hash, int ai);
135 
136 template <typename... C>
137 auto createFieldsFromColumns(framework::pack<C...>)
138 {
139  return std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Field>>{C::asArrowField()...};
140 }
141 
142 using SelectionVector = std::vector<int64_t>;
143 
144 template <typename, typename = void>
145 inline constexpr bool is_index_column_v = false;
146 
147 template <typename T>
148 inline constexpr bool is_index_column_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::binding_t))>> = true;
149 
150 template <typename, typename = void>
151 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_originals_v = false;
152 
153 template <typename T>
154 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_originals_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::originals))>> = true;
155 
156 template <typename T, typename = void>
157 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_parent_v = false;
158 
159 template <typename T>
160 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_parent_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::parent_t))>> = true;
161 
162 template <typename, typename = void>
163 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_metadata_v = false;
164 
165 template <typename T>
166 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_metadata_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::metadata))>> = true;
167 
168 template <typename, typename = void>
169 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_binding_v = false;
170 
171 template <typename T>
172 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_binding_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::binding_t))>> = true;
173 
174 template <typename, typename = void>
175 inline constexpr bool is_type_spawnable_v = false;
176 
177 template <typename T>
178 inline constexpr bool is_type_spawnable_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::spawnable_t))>> = true;
179 
180 template <typename, typename = void>
181 inline constexpr bool is_soa_extension_table_v = false;
182 
183 template <typename T>
184 inline constexpr bool is_soa_extension_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::expression_pack_t))>> = true;
185 
186 template <typename T, typename = void>
187 inline constexpr bool is_index_table_v = false;
188 
189 template <typename T>
190 inline constexpr bool is_index_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::indexing_t))>> = true;
191 
192 template <typename, typename = void>
193 inline constexpr bool is_self_index_column_v = false;
194 
195 template <typename T>
196 inline constexpr bool is_self_index_column_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::self_index_t))>> = true;
197 
198 template <typename, typename = void>
199 inline constexpr bool is_with_base_table_v = false;
200 
201 template <typename T>
202 inline constexpr bool is_with_base_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::base_table_t))>> = true;
203 
204 template <typename B, typename E>
205 struct EquivalentIndex {
206  constexpr static bool value = false;
207 };
208 
209 template <typename B, typename E>
210 constexpr bool is_index_equivalent_v = EquivalentIndex<B, E>::value || EquivalentIndex<E, B>::value;
211 
212 template <typename T, typename TLambda>
213 void call_if_has_originals(TLambda&& lambda)
214 {
215  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
216  lambda(static_cast<T*>(nullptr));
217  }
218 }
219 
220 template <typename T, typename TLambda>
221 void call_if_has_not_originals(TLambda&& lambda)
222 {
223  if constexpr (!is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
224  lambda(static_cast<T*>(nullptr));
225  }
226 }
227 
228 template <typename H, typename... T>
229 consteval decltype(auto) make_originals_from_type()
230 {
231  using decayed = std::decay_t<H>;
232  if constexpr (sizeof...(T) == 0) {
233  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<decayed>) {
234  return typename decayed::originals{};
235  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<typename decayed::table_t>) {
236  return typename decayed::table_t::originals{};
237  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_parent_v<decayed>) {
238  return make_originals_from_type<typename decayed::parent_t>();
239  } else {
240  return framework::pack<decayed>{};
241  }
242  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<decayed>) {
243  return framework::concatenate_pack(typename decayed::originals{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
244  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<typename decayed::table_t>) {
245  return framework::concatenate_pack(typename decayed::table_t::originals{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
246  } else {
247  return framework::concatenate_pack(framework::pack<decayed>{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
248  }
249 }
250 
251 template <typename... T>
252 consteval decltype(auto) make_originals_from_type(framework::pack<T...> p)
253 {
254  if constexpr (sizeof...(T) == 0) {
255  return framework::pack<>{};
256  } else {
257  return []<typename H, typename... Ta>(framework::pack<H, Ta...>) {
258  return make_originals_from_type<H, Ta...>();
259  }(p);
260  }
261 }
262 
266 struct Chunked {
267  constexpr static bool chunked = true;
268 };
269 
272 struct Flat {
273  constexpr static bool chunked = false;
274 };
275 
277 template <typename T>
278 struct unwrap {
279  using type = T;
280 };
281 
282 template <typename T>
283 struct unwrap<std::vector<T>> {
284  using type = T;
285 };
286 
287 template <>
288 struct unwrap<bool> {
289  using type = char;
290 };
291 
292 template <typename T>
293 using unwrap_t = typename unwrap<T>::type;
294 
299 template <typename T, typename ChunkingPolicy = Chunked>
300 class ColumnIterator : ChunkingPolicy
301 {
302  static constexpr char SCALE_FACTOR = std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, bool> ? 3 : 0;
303 
304  public:
309  ColumnIterator(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column)
310  : mColumn{column},
311  mCurrent{nullptr},
312  mCurrentPos{nullptr},
313  mLast{nullptr},
314  mFirstIndex{0},
315  mCurrentChunk{0},
316  mOffset{0}
317  {
318  auto array = getCurrentArray();
319  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR);
320  mLast = mCurrent + array->length();
321  }
322 
323  ColumnIterator() = default;
324  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
325  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
326 
327  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
328  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
329 
331  void nextChunk() const
332  {
333  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
334  mFirstIndex += previousArray->length();
335 
336  mCurrentChunk++;
337  auto array = getCurrentArray();
338  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
339  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
340  }
341 
342  void prevChunk() const
343  {
344  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
345  mFirstIndex -= previousArray->length();
346 
347  mCurrentChunk--;
348  auto array = getCurrentArray();
349  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
350  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
351  }
352 
353  void moveToChunk(int chunk)
354  {
355  if (mCurrentChunk < chunk) {
356  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
357  nextChunk();
358  }
359  } else {
360  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
361  prevChunk();
362  }
363  }
364  }
365 
367  void moveToEnd()
368  {
369  mCurrentChunk = mColumn->num_chunks() - 1;
370  auto array = getCurrentArray();
371  mFirstIndex = mColumn->length() - array->length();
372  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
373  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
374  }
375 
376  decltype(auto) operator*() const
377  {
378  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
379  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
380  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
381  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex >= list->length())) {
382  nextChunk();
383  }
384  } else {
385  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) >= mLast))) {
386  nextChunk();
387  }
388  }
389  }
390  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<bool, std::decay_t<T>>) {
391  // FIXME: check if shifting the masked bit to the first position is better than != 0
392  return (*(mCurrent - (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) + ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) >> SCALE_FACTOR)) & (1 << ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) & 0x7))) != 0;
393  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
394  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
395  auto offset = list->value_offset(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
396  auto length = list->value_length(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
397  return gsl::span{mCurrent + mFirstIndex + offset, mCurrent + mFirstIndex + (offset + length)};
398  } else {
399  return *(mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR));
400  }
401  }
402 
403  // Move to the chunk which containts element pos
404  ColumnIterator<T>& moveToPos()
405  {
406  // If we get outside range of the current chunk, go to the next.
407  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
408  while (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) >= mLast)) {
409  nextChunk();
410  }
411  }
412  return *this;
413  }
414 
415  // Move to the chunk which containts element pos
416  ColumnIterator<T>& checkNextChunk()
417  {
418  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
419  if (O2_BUILTIN_LIKELY((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) <= mLast)) {
420  return *this;
421  }
422  nextChunk();
423  }
424  return *this;
425  }
426 
427  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mCurrent;
428  int64_t const* mCurrentPos;
429  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mLast;
430  arrow::ChunkedArray const* mColumn;
431  mutable int mFirstIndex;
432  mutable int mCurrentChunk;
433  mutable int mOffset;
434 
435  private:
437  auto getCurrentArray() const
438  {
439  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array> chunkToUse = mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk);
440  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
441  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::FixedSizeListArray>) {
442  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::FixedSizeListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
443  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
444  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
445  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
446  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
447  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
448  } else {
449  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<T>>(chunkToUse);
450  }
451  }
452 };
453 
454 template <typename T, typename INHERIT>
455 struct Column {
456  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
457  Column(ColumnIterator<T> const& it)
458  : mColumnIterator{it}
459  {
460  }
461 
462  Column() = default;
463  Column(Column const&) = default;
464  Column& operator=(Column const&) = default;
465 
466  Column(Column&&) = default;
467  Column& operator=(Column&&) = default;
468 
469  using persistent = std::true_type;
470  using type = T;
471  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
472  ColumnIterator<T> const& getIterator() const
473  {
474  return mColumnIterator;
475  }
476 
477  static auto asArrowField()
478  {
479  return std::make_shared<arrow::Field>(inherited_t::mLabel, framework::expressions::concreteArrowType(framework::expressions::selectArrowType<type>()));
480  }
481 
484  ColumnIterator<T> mColumnIterator;
485 };
486 
489 template <typename F, typename INHERIT>
490 struct DynamicColumn {
491  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
492 
493  using persistent = std::false_type;
494  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
495 };
496 
497 template <typename INHERIT>
498 struct IndexColumn {
499  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
500 
501  using persistent = std::false_type;
502  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
503 };
504 
505 template <typename INHERIT>
506 struct MarkerColumn {
507  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
508 
509  using persistent = std::false_type;
510  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
511 };
512 
513 template <size_t M = 0>
514 struct Marker : o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>> {
515  using type = size_t;
516  using base = o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>>;
517  constexpr inline static auto value = M;
518 
519  Marker() = default;
520  Marker(Marker const&) = default;
521  Marker(Marker&&) = default;
522 
523  Marker& operator=(Marker const&) = default;
524  Marker& operator=(Marker&&) = default;
525 
526  Marker(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) {}
527  constexpr inline auto mark()
528  {
529  return value;
530  }
531 
532  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Marker";
533 };
534 
535 template <int64_t START = 0, int64_t END = -1>
536 struct Index : o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>> {
537  using base = o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>>;
538  constexpr inline static int64_t start = START;
539  constexpr inline static int64_t end = END;
540 
541  Index() = default;
542  Index(Index const&) = default;
543  Index(Index&&) = default;
544 
545  Index& operator=(Index const&) = default;
546  Index& operator=(Index&&) = default;
547 
548  Index(arrow::ChunkedArray const*)
549  {
550  }
551 
552  constexpr inline int64_t rangeStart()
553  {
554  return START;
555  }
556 
557  constexpr inline int64_t rangeEnd()
558  {
559  return END;
560  }
561 
562  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
563  {
564  return index<0>();
565  }
566 
567  [[nodiscard]] int64_t filteredIndex() const
568  {
569  return index<1>();
570  }
571 
572  [[nodiscard]] int64_t globalIndex() const
573  {
574  return index<0>() + offsets<0>();
575  }
576 
577  template <int N = 0>
578  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
579  {
580  return *std::get<N>(rowIndices);
581  }
582 
583  template <int N = 0>
584  [[nodiscard]] int64_t offsets() const
585  {
586  return *std::get<N>(rowOffsets);
587  }
588 
589  void setIndices(std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> indices)
590  {
591  rowIndices = indices;
592  }
593 
594  void setOffsets(std::tuple<uint64_t const*> offsets)
595  {
596  rowOffsets = offsets;
597  }
598 
599  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Index";
600  using type = int64_t;
601 
602  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<>;
603  std::tuple<> boundIterators;
604  std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> rowIndices;
607  std::tuple<uint64_t const*> rowOffsets;
608 };
609 
610 template <typename T>
611 using is_dynamic_t = framework::is_specialization<typename T::base, DynamicColumn>;
612 
613 namespace persistent_type_helper
614 {
615 // This checks both for the existence of the ::persistent member in the class T as well as the value returned stored in it.
616 // Hack: a pointer to any field of type int inside persistent. Both true_type and false_type do not have any int field, but anyways we pass nullptr.
617 // The compiler picks the version with exact number of arguments when only it can, i.e., when T::persistent is defined.
618 template <class T>
619 typename T::persistent test(int T::persistent::*);
620 
621 template <class>
622 std::false_type test(...);
623 } // namespace persistent_type_helper
624 
625 template <typename T>
626 using is_persistent_t = decltype(persistent_type_helper::test<T>(nullptr));
627 
628 template <typename T>
629 constexpr auto is_persistent_v = is_persistent_t<T>::value;
630 
631 template <typename T>
632 constexpr auto is_dynamic_v = is_dynamic_t<T>::value;
633 
634 template <typename T>
635 using is_external_index_t = typename std::conditional<is_index_column_v<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>::type;
636 
637 template <typename T>
638 using is_self_index_t = typename std::conditional<is_self_index_column_v<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>::type;
639 
640 template <typename T, template <auto...> class Ref>
641 struct is_index : std::false_type {
642 };
643 
644 template <template <auto...> class Ref, auto... Args>
645 struct is_index<Ref<Args...>, Ref> : std::true_type {
646 };
647 
648 template <typename T>
649 using is_index_t = is_index<T, Index>;
650 
651 struct IndexPolicyBase {
653  int64_t mRowIndex = 0;
655  uint64_t mOffset = 0;
656 };
657 
658 struct RowViewSentinel {
659  int64_t const index;
660 };
661 
662 struct FilteredIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
663  // We use -1 in the IndexPolicyBase to indicate that the index is
664  // invalid. What will validate the index is the this->setCursor()
665  // which happens below which will properly setup the first index
666  // by remapping the filtered index 0 to whatever unfiltered index
667  // it belongs to.
668  FilteredIndexPolicy(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection, int64_t rows, uint64_t offset = 0)
669  : IndexPolicyBase{-1, offset},
670  mSelectedRows(selection),
671  mMaxSelection(selection.size()),
672  nRows{rows}
673  {
674  this->setCursor(0);
675  }
676 
677  void resetSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
678  {
679  mSelectedRows = selection;
680  mMaxSelection = selection.size();
681  this->setCursor(0);
682  }
683 
684  FilteredIndexPolicy() = default;
685  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
686  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
687  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
688  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
689 
690  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
691  getIndices() const
692  {
693  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mSelectionRow);
694  }
695 
696  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
697  getOffsets() const
698  {
699  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
700  }
701 
702  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
703  {
704  this->setCursor(start);
705  if (end >= 0) {
706  mMaxSelection = std::min(end, mMaxSelection);
707  }
708  }
709 
710  void setCursor(int64_t i)
711  {
712  mSelectionRow = i;
713  updateRow();
714  }
715 
716  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
717  {
718  mSelectionRow += i;
719  updateRow();
720  }
721 
722  friend bool operator==(FilteredIndexPolicy const& lh, FilteredIndexPolicy const& rh)
723  {
724  return lh.mSelectionRow == rh.mSelectionRow;
725  }
726 
727  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
728  {
729  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mSelectionRow == sentinel.index);
730  }
731 
735  void moveToEnd()
736  {
737  this->mSelectionRow = this->mMaxSelection;
738  this->mRowIndex = -1;
739  }
740 
741  [[nodiscard]] auto getSelectionRow() const
742  {
743  return mSelectionRow;
744  }
745 
746  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
747  {
748  return mMaxSelection;
749  }
750 
751  [[nodiscard]] auto raw_size() const
752  {
753  return nRows;
754  }
755 
756  private:
757  inline void updateRow()
758  {
759  this->mRowIndex = O2_BUILTIN_LIKELY(mSelectionRow < mMaxSelection) ? mSelectedRows[mSelectionRow] : -1;
760  }
761  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
762  int64_t mSelectionRow = 0;
763  int64_t mMaxSelection = 0;
764  int64_t nRows = 0;
765 };
766 
767 struct DefaultIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
769  DefaultIndexPolicy() = default;
770  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
771  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
772  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
773  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
774 
778  DefaultIndexPolicy(int64_t nRows, uint64_t offset)
779  : IndexPolicyBase{0, offset},
780  mMaxRow(nRows)
781  {
782  }
783 
784  DefaultIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const& other)
785  : IndexPolicyBase{0, other.mOffset},
786  mMaxRow(other.raw_size())
787  {
788  }
789 
790  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
791  {
792  this->setCursor(start);
793  if (end >= 0) {
794  mMaxRow = std::min(end, mMaxRow);
795  }
796  }
797 
798  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
799  getIndices() const
800  {
801  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mRowIndex);
802  }
803 
804  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
805  getOffsets() const
806  {
807  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
808  }
809 
810  void setCursor(int64_t i)
811  {
812  this->mRowIndex = i;
813  }
814  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
815  {
816  this->mRowIndex += i;
817  }
818 
819  void moveToEnd()
820  {
821  this->setCursor(mMaxRow);
822  }
823 
824  friend bool operator==(DefaultIndexPolicy const& lh, DefaultIndexPolicy const& rh)
825  {
826  return lh.mRowIndex == rh.mRowIndex;
827  }
828 
829  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
830  {
831  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(this->mRowIndex == sentinel.index);
832  }
833 
834  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
835  {
836  return mMaxRow;
837  }
838 
839  int64_t mMaxRow = 0;
840 };
841 
842 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... C>
843 class Table;
844 
847 template <typename C>
848 struct ColumnDataHolder {
849  C* first;
850  arrow::ChunkedArray* second;
851 };
852 
853 template <typename T, typename B>
854 concept CanBind = requires(T&& t) {
855  { t.B::mColumnIterator };
856 };
857 
858 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename IP, typename... C>
859 struct RowViewCore : public IP, C... {
860  public:
861  using policy_t = IP;
862  using table_t = o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, C...>;
863  using all_columns = framework::pack<C...>;
864  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_persistent_t, C...>;
865  using index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_index_t, C...>;
866  constexpr inline static bool has_index_v = framework::pack_size(index_columns_t{}) > 0;
867  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
868  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_self_index_t, C...>;
869 
870  RowViewCore(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[sizeof...(C)], IP&& policy)
871  : IP{policy},
872  C(columnData[framework::has_type_at_v<C>(all_columns{})])...
873  {
874  bind();
875  // In case we have an index column might need to constrain the actual
876  // number of rows in the view to the range provided by the index.
877  // FIXME: we should really understand what happens to an index when we
878  // have a RowViewFiltered.
879  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
880  this->limitRange(this->rangeStart(), this->rangeEnd());
881  }
882  }
883 
884  RowViewCore() = default;
885  RowViewCore(RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...> const& other)
886  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
887  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
888  {
889  bind();
890  }
891 
892  RowViewCore& operator=(RowViewCore other)
893  {
894  IP::operator=(static_cast<IP const&>(other));
895  (void(static_cast<C&>(*this) = static_cast<C>(other)), ...);
896  bind();
897  return *this;
898  }
899 
900  RowViewCore(RowViewCore<ORIGIN, FilteredIndexPolicy, C...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
901  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
902  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
903  {
904  bind();
905  }
906 
907  RowViewCore& operator++()
908  {
909  this->moveByIndex(1);
910  return *this;
911  }
912 
913  RowViewCore operator++(int)
914  {
915  RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...> copy = *this;
916  this->operator++();
917  return copy;
918  }
919 
920  RowViewCore& operator--()
921  {
922  this->moveByIndex(-1);
923  return *this;
924  }
925 
926  RowViewCore operator--(int)
927  {
928  RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...> copy = *this;
929  this->operator--();
930  return copy;
931  }
932 
934  RowViewCore operator+(int64_t inc) const
935  {
936  RowViewCore copy = *this;
937  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
938  return copy;
939  }
940 
941  RowViewCore operator-(int64_t dec) const
942  {
943  return operator+(-dec);
944  }
945 
946  RowViewCore const& operator*() const
947  {
948  return *this;
949  }
950 
951  template <typename... CL, typename TA>
952  void doSetCurrentIndex(framework::pack<CL...>, TA* current)
953  {
954  (CL::setCurrent(current), ...);
955  }
956 
957  template <typename CL>
958  auto getCurrent() const
959  {
960  return CL::getCurrentRaw();
961  }
962 
963  template <typename... Cs>
964  auto getIndexBindingsImpl(framework::pack<Cs...>) const
965  {
966  return std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>{static_cast<Cs const&>(*this).getCurrentRaw()...};
967  }
968 
969  auto getIndexBindings() const
970  {
971  return getIndexBindingsImpl(external_index_columns_t{});
972  }
973 
974  template <typename... TA>
975  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
976  {
977  (doSetCurrentIndex(external_index_columns_t{}, current), ...);
978  }
979 
980  template <typename... Cs>
981  void doSetCurrentIndexRaw(framework::pack<Cs...> p, std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
982  {
983  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(ptrs[framework::has_type_at_v<Cs>(p)]), ...);
984  }
985 
986  template <typename... Cs, typename I>
987  void doSetCurrentInternal(framework::pack<Cs...>, I const* ptr)
988  {
989  o2::soa::Binding b;
990  b.bind(ptr);
991  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(b), ...);
992  }
993 
994  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
995  {
996  doSetCurrentIndexRaw(external_index_columns_t{}, std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
997  }
998 
999  template <typename I>
1000  void bindInternalIndices(I const* table)
1001  {
1002  doSetCurrentInternal(internal_index_columns_t{}, table);
1003  }
1004 
1005  private:
1008  template <typename... PC>
1009  void checkNextChunk(framework::pack<PC...>)
1010  {
1011  (PC::mColumnIterator.checkNextChunk(), ...);
1012  }
1013 
1015  template <typename... PC>
1016  void doMoveToEnd(framework::pack<PC...>)
1017  {
1018  (PC::mColumnIterator.moveToEnd(), ...);
1019  }
1020 
1023  void bind()
1024  {
1025  using namespace o2::soa;
1026  auto f = framework::overloaded {
1027  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void requires is_persistent_v<T> { T::mColumnIterator.mCurrentPos = &this->mRowIndex; },
1028  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void requires is_dynamic_v<T> { bindDynamicColumn<T>(typename T::bindings_t{});},
1029  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void {},
1030 };
1031  (f(static_cast<C*>(nullptr)), ...);
1032  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
1033  this->setIndices(this->getIndices());
1034  this->setOffsets(this->getOffsets());
1035  }
1036  }
1037 
1038  template <typename DC, typename... B>
1039  auto bindDynamicColumn(framework::pack<B...>)
1040  {
1041  DC::boundIterators = std::make_tuple(getDynamicBinding<B>()...);
1042  }
1043 
1044  // Sometimes dynamic columns are defined for tables in
1045  // the hope that it will be joined / extended with another one which provides
1046  // the full set of bindings. This is to avoid a compilation
1047  // error if constructor for the table or any other thing involving a missing
1048  // binding is preinstanciated.
1049  template <typename B>
1050  requires(CanBind<typename table_t::iterator, B>)
1051  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
1052  {
1053  static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(&(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator)), std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>, "foo");
1054  return &(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator);
1055  //return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
1056  }
1057 
1058  template <typename B>
1059  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
1060  {
1061  return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
1062  }
1063 };
1064 
1065 template <typename, typename = void>
1066 constexpr bool is_type_with_policy_v = false;
1067 
1068 template <typename T>
1069 constexpr bool is_type_with_policy_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::policy_t))>> = true;
1070 
1071 struct ArrowHelpers {
1072  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> joinTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1073  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> concatTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1074 };
1075 
1076 template <typename... T>
1077 using originals_pack_t = decltype(make_originals_from_type(framework::pack<T...>{}));
1078 
1079 template <typename T, typename... Os>
1080 constexpr bool are_bindings_compatible_v(framework::pack<Os...>&&)
1081 {
1082  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
1083  return (are_bindings_compatible_v<Os>(originals_pack_t<T>{}) || ...);
1084  } else {
1085  return ((std::is_same_v<T, Os> || is_index_equivalent_v<T, Os>) || ...);
1086  }
1087 }
1088 
1089 template <typename T, typename B>
1090 constexpr bool is_binding_compatible_v()
1091 {
1092  return are_bindings_compatible_v<T>(originals_pack_t<B>{});
1093 }
1094 
1095 template <typename T, typename B>
1096 struct is_binding_compatible : std::conditional_t<is_binding_compatible_v<T, typename B::binding_t>(), std::true_type, std::false_type> {
1097 };
1098 
1099 template <typename T>
1100 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1101 {
1102  if constexpr (soa::is_index_table_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1103  using TT = typename std::decay_t<T>::first_t;
1104  if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<TT>>) {
1105  using O = typename framework::pack_head_t<typename std::decay_t<TT>::originals>;
1106  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<O>::metadata;
1107  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1108  } else {
1109  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata;
1110  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1111  }
1112  } else if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1113  using TT = typename framework::pack_head_t<typename std::decay_t<T>::originals>;
1114  if constexpr (soa::is_with_base_table_v<typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata>) {
1115  using TTT = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata::base_table_t;
1116  return getLabelFromType<TTT>();
1117  } else {
1118  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata;
1119  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1120  }
1121  } else {
1122  if constexpr (soa::is_with_base_table_v<typename aod::MetadataTrait<T>::metadata>) {
1123  using TT = typename aod::MetadataTrait<T>::metadata::base_table_t;
1124  return getLabelFromType<TT>();
1125  } else {
1126  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<std::decay_t<T>>::metadata;
1127  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1128  }
1129  }
1130 }
1131 
1132 template <typename... C>
1133 static constexpr auto hasColumnForKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1134 {
1135  return ((C::inherited_t::mLabel == key) || ...);
1136 }
1137 
1138 template <typename T>
1139 static constexpr std::pair<bool, std::string> hasKey(std::string const& key)
1140 {
1141  return {hasColumnForKey(typename T::persistent_columns_t{}, key), getLabelFromType<T>()};
1142 }
1143 
1144 template <typename... C>
1145 static constexpr auto haveKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1146 {
1147  return std::vector{hasKey<C>(key)...};
1148 }
1149 
1150 void notFoundColumn(const char* label, const char* key);
1151 void missingOptionalPreslice(const char* label, const char* key);
1152 
1153 template <typename T, bool OPT = false>
1154 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromTypeForKey(std::string const& key)
1155 {
1156  if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1157  using Os = typename std::decay_t<T>::originals;
1158  auto locate = haveKey(Os{}, key);
1159  auto it = std::find_if(locate.begin(), locate.end(), [](auto const& x) { return x.first; });
1160  if (it != locate.end()) {
1161  return it->second;
1162  }
1163  } else {
1164  auto locate = hasKey<std::decay_t<T>>(key);
1165  if (locate.first) {
1166  return locate.second;
1167  }
1168  }
1169  if constexpr (!OPT) {
1170  notFoundColumn(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), key.data());
1171  } else {
1172  return "[MISSING]";
1173  }
1174  O2_BUILTIN_UNREACHABLE();
1175 }
1176 
1177 template <typename B, typename... C>
1178 consteval static bool hasIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1179 {
1180  return (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>() || ...);
1181 }
1182 
1183 template <typename B, typename... C>
1184 consteval static bool hasSortedIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1185 {
1186  return ((C::sorted && o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>()) || ...);
1187 }
1188 
1189 template <typename B, typename Z>
1190 consteval static bool relatedByIndex()
1191 {
1192  return hasIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1193 }
1194 
1195 template <typename B, typename Z>
1196 consteval static bool relatedBySortedIndex()
1197 {
1198  return hasSortedIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1199 }
1200 } // namespace o2::soa
1201 
1202 namespace o2::framework
1203 {
1204 template <typename T, bool OPT = false, bool SORTED = true>
1205 struct PresliceBase {
1206  constexpr static bool sorted = SORTED;
1207  constexpr static bool optional = OPT;
1208  using target_t = T;
1209  const std::string binding;
1210 
1211  PresliceBase(expressions::BindingNode index_)
1212  : binding{o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T, OPT>(index_.name)},
1213  bindingKey{binding, index_.name} {}
1214 
1215  void updateSliceInfo(std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr>&& si)
1216  {
1217  sliceInfo = si;
1218  }
1219 
1220  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> getSliceFor(int value, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> const& input, uint64_t& offset) const
1221  {
1222  if constexpr (OPT) {
1223  if (isMissing()) {
1224  return nullptr;
1225  }
1226  }
1227  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1228  auto [offset_, count] = sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1229  auto output = input->Slice(offset_, count);
1230  offset = static_cast<int64_t>(offset_);
1231  return output;
1232  } else {
1233  static_assert(SORTED, "Wrong method called for unsorted cache");
1234  }
1235  }
1236 
1237  gsl::span<const int64_t> getSliceFor(int value) const
1238  {
1239  if constexpr (OPT) {
1240  if (isMissing()) {
1241  return {};
1242  }
1243  }
1244  if constexpr (!SORTED) {
1245  return sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1246  } else {
1247  static_assert(!SORTED, "Wrong method called for sorted cache");
1248  }
1249  }
1250 
1251  bool isMissing() const
1252  {
1253  return binding == "[MISSING]";
1254  }
1255 
1256  StringPair const& getBindingKey() const
1257  {
1258  return bindingKey;
1259  }
1260 
1261  std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr> sliceInfo;
1262 
1263  StringPair bindingKey;
1264 };
1265 
1266 template <typename T>
1267 using PresliceUnsorted = PresliceBase<T, false, false>;
1268 template <typename T>
1269 using PresliceUnsortedOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, false>;
1270 template <typename T>
1271 using Preslice = PresliceBase<T, false, true>;
1272 template <typename T>
1273 using PresliceOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, true>;
1274 
1275 } // namespace o2::framework
1276 
1277 namespace o2::soa
1278 {
1280 template <typename T, template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class Ref>
1281 struct is_specialization_origin : std::false_type {
1282 };
1283 
1284 template <template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class Ref, o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... Args>
1285 struct is_specialization_origin<Ref<ORIGIN, Args...>, Ref> : std::true_type {
1286 };
1287 
1288 template <typename T, template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class Ref>
1289 inline constexpr bool is_specialization_origin_v = is_specialization_origin<T, Ref>::value;
1290 
1291 template <template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class base, typename derived>
1292 struct is_base_of_template_origin_impl {
1293  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... Ts>
1294  static constexpr std::true_type test(const base<ORIGIN, Ts...>*);
1295  static constexpr std::false_type test(...);
1296  using type = decltype(test(std::declval<derived*>()));
1297 };
1298 
1299 template <template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class base, typename derived>
1300 using is_base_of_template_origin = typename is_base_of_template_origin_impl<base, derived>::type;
1301 
1302 template <template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename...> class base, typename derived>
1303 inline constexpr bool is_base_of_template_origin_v = is_base_of_template_origin<base, derived>::value;
1304 
1306 template <typename T>
1307 inline constexpr bool is_soa_iterator_v = soa::is_base_of_template_origin_v<RowViewCore, T> || soa::is_specialization_origin_v<T, RowViewCore>;
1308 
1309 template <typename T>
1310 inline consteval bool is_soa_filtered_iterator_v()
1311 {
1312  if constexpr (!is_soa_iterator_v<T>) {
1313  return false;
1314  } else {
1315  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<typename T::policy_t, soa::FilteredIndexPolicy>) {
1316  return true;
1317  } else {
1318  return false;
1319  }
1320  }
1321 }
1322 
1323 template <typename T>
1324 using is_soa_table_t = typename soa::is_specialization_origin<T, soa::Table>;
1325 
1326 template <typename T>
1327 inline constexpr bool is_soa_table_like_v = soa::is_base_of_template_origin_v<soa::Table, T>;
1328 
1329 template <typename T>
1330 class FilteredBase;
1331 template <typename T>
1332 class Filtered;
1333 
1334 template <typename T>
1335 inline constexpr bool is_soa_filtered_v = framework::is_base_of_template_v<soa::FilteredBase, T>;
1336 
1338 template <typename... Is>
1339 static consteval auto extractBindings(framework::pack<Is...>)
1340 {
1341  return framework::pack<typename Is::binding_t...>{};
1342 }
1343 
1344 SelectionVector selectionToVector(gandiva::Selection const& sel);
1345 
1346 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
1347 auto doSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value)
1348 {
1349  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1350  if constexpr (OPT) {
1351  if (container.isMissing()) {
1352  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1353  }
1354  }
1355  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1356  uint64_t offset = 0;
1357  auto out = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1358  auto t = typename T::self_t({out}, offset);
1359  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1360  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1361  return t;
1362  } else {
1363  auto selection = container.getSliceFor(value);
1364  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1365  auto t = soa::Filtered<typename T::base_t>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1366  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1367  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1368  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows()); // intersect filters
1369  return t;
1370  } else {
1371  auto t = soa::Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1372  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1373  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1374  return t;
1375  }
1376  }
1377  } else {
1378  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1379  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1380  } else {
1381  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong PresliceUnsorted<> entry used: incompatible type");
1382  }
1383  }
1384 }
1385 
1386 template <typename T>
1387 auto prepareFilteredSlice(T const* table, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> slice, uint64_t offset)
1388 {
1389  if (offset >= static_cast<uint64_t>(table->tableSize())) {
1390  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1391  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1392  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1393  return fresult;
1394  } else {
1395  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1396  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1397  return fresult;
1398  }
1399  }
1400  auto start = offset;
1401  auto end = start + slice->num_rows();
1402  auto mSelectedRows = table->getSelectedRows();
1403  auto start_iterator = std::lower_bound(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), start);
1404  auto stop_iterator = std::lower_bound(start_iterator, mSelectedRows.end(), end);
1405  SelectionVector slicedSelection{start_iterator, stop_iterator};
1406  std::transform(slicedSelection.begin(), slicedSelection.end(), slicedSelection.begin(),
1407  [&start](int64_t idx) {
1408  return idx - static_cast<int64_t>(start);
1409  });
1410  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1411  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1412  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1413  return fresult;
1414  } else {
1415  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1416  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1417  return fresult;
1418  }
1419 }
1420 
1421 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT>
1422 auto doFilteredSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT> const& container, int value)
1423 {
1424  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1425  if constexpr (OPT) {
1426  if (container.isMissing()) {
1427  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<T>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1428  }
1429  }
1430  uint64_t offset = 0;
1431  auto slice = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1432  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1433  } else {
1434  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1435  }
1436 }
1437 
1438 template <typename T>
1439 auto doSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1440 {
1441  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1442  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1443  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count)}, static_cast<uint64_t>(offset));
1444  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1445  return t;
1446 }
1447 
1448 template <typename T>
1449 auto doFilteredSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1450 {
1451  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1452  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1453  auto slice = table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count);
1454  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1455 }
1456 
1457 template <typename T>
1458 auto doSliceByCachedUnsorted(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1459 {
1460  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheUnsortedFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1461  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1462  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1463  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows());
1464  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1465  return t;
1466  } else {
1467  auto t = Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1468  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1469  return t;
1470  }
1471 }
1472 
1473 template <typename T>
1474 auto select(T const& t, framework::expressions::Filter const& f)
1475 {
1476  return Filtered<T>({t.asArrowTable()}, selectionToVector(framework::expressions::createSelection(t.asArrowTable(), f)));
1477 }
1478 
1479 arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexFromLabel(arrow::Table* table, const char* label);
1480 
1483 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... C>
1484 class Table
1485 {
1486  public:
1487  static constexpr o2::framework::OriginEnc mOrigin{ORIGIN};
1488  using self_t = Table<ORIGIN, C...>;
1489  using table_t = Table<ORIGIN, C...>;
1490  using columns = framework::pack<C...>;
1491  using column_types = framework::pack<typename C::type...>;
1492  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_persistent_t, C...>;
1493  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
1494  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_self_index_t, C...>;
1495 
1496  static constexpr auto hashes()
1497  {
1498  return std::set{{o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<C>()...}};
1499  }
1500 
1501  template <typename IP, typename Parent, typename... T>
1502  struct RowViewBase : public RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...> {
1503 
1504  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
1505  using bindings_pack_t = decltype(extractBindings(external_index_columns_t{}));
1506  using parent_t = Parent;
1507  using originals = originals_pack_t<T...>;
1508  using policy_t = IP;
1509 
1510  RowViewBase() = default;
1511 
1512  RowViewBase(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[sizeof...(C)], IP&& policy)
1513  : RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>(columnData, std::forward<decltype(policy)>(policy))
1514  {
1515  }
1516 
1517  template <typename P, typename... O>
1518  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1519  {
1520  static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>>(other);
1521  return *this;
1522  }
1523 
1524  template <typename P>
1525  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> other)
1526  {
1527  static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>>(other);
1528  return *this;
1529  }
1530 
1531  template <typename P>
1532  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1533  {
1534  static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<ORIGIN, FilteredIndexPolicy, C...>>(other);
1535  return *this;
1536  }
1537 
1538  template <typename P, typename... O>
1539  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1540  {
1541  *this = other;
1542  }
1543 
1544  template <typename P, typename... O>
1545  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...>&& other) noexcept requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1546  {
1547  *this = other;
1548  }
1549 
1550  template <typename P>
1551  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1552  {
1553  *this = other;
1554  }
1555 
1556  template <typename P>
1557  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...>&& other) noexcept
1558  {
1559  *this = other;
1560  }
1561 
1562  template <typename P>
1563  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1564  {
1565  *this = other;
1566  }
1567 
1568  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewSentinel const& other)
1569  {
1570  this->mRowIndex = other.index;
1571  return *this;
1572  }
1573 
1574  template <typename P>
1575  void matchTo(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1576  {
1577  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1578  }
1579 
1580  template <typename P, typename... O>
1581  void matchTo(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1582  {
1583  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1584  }
1585 
1586  template <typename TI>
1587  auto getId() const
1588  {
1589  using decayed = std::decay_t<TI>;
1590  if constexpr (framework::has_type<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{})) { // index to another table
1591  constexpr auto idx = framework::has_type_at_v<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{});
1592  return framework::pack_element_t<idx, external_index_columns_t>::getId();
1593  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<decayed, Parent>) { // self index
1594  return this->globalIndex();
1595  } else if constexpr (is_index_t<decayed>::value && decayed::mLabel == "Index") { // soa::Index<>
1596  return this->globalIndex();
1597  } else {
1598  return static_cast<int32_t>(-1);
1599  }
1600  }
1601 
1602  template <typename CD, typename... CDArgs>
1603  auto getDynamicColumn() const
1604  {
1605  using decayed = std::decay_t<CD>;
1606  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<decayed>(), "Requested column is not a dynamic column");
1607  return static_cast<decayed>(*this).template getDynamicValue<CDArgs...>();
1608  }
1609 
1610  template <typename B, typename CC>
1611  auto getValue() const
1612  {
1613  using COL = std::decay_t<CC>;
1614  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<COL>() || is_persistent_v<COL>, "Should be persistent or dynamic column with no argument that has a return type convertable to float");
1615  return static_cast<B>(static_cast<COL>(*this).get());
1616  }
1617 
1618  template <typename B, typename... CCs>
1619  std::array<B, sizeof...(CCs)> getValues() const
1620  {
1621  static_assert(std::is_same_v<B, float> || std::is_same_v<B, double>, "The common return type should be float or double");
1622  return {getValue<B, CCs>()...};
1623  }
1624 
1625  using IP::size;
1626 
1627  using RowViewCore<ORIGIN, IP, C...>::operator++;
1628 
1630  RowViewBase operator+(int64_t inc) const
1631  {
1632  RowViewBase copy = *this;
1633  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
1634  return copy;
1635  }
1636 
1637  RowViewBase operator-(int64_t dec) const
1638  {
1639  return operator+(-dec);
1640  }
1641 
1642  RowViewBase const& operator*() const
1643  {
1644  return *this;
1645  }
1646  };
1647  template <typename P, typename... Ts>
1648  using RowView = RowViewBase<DefaultIndexPolicy, P, Ts...>;
1649 
1650  template <typename P, typename... Ts>
1651  using RowViewFiltered = RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, Ts...>;
1652 
1653  using iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1654  using const_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1655  using unfiltered_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1656  using unfiltered_const_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1657  using filtered_iterator = RowViewFiltered<table_t, table_t>;
1658  using filtered_const_iterator = RowViewFiltered<table_t, table_t>;
1659 
1660  Table(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
1661  : mTable(table),
1662  mEnd{table->num_rows()},
1663  mOffset(offset)
1664  {
1665  if (mTable->num_rows() == 0) {
1666  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < sizeof...(C); ++ci) {
1667  mColumnChunks[ci] = nullptr;
1668  }
1669  mBegin = mEnd;
1670  } else {
1671  arrow::ChunkedArray* lookups[] = {lookupColumn<C>()...};
1672  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < sizeof...(C); ++ci) {
1673  mColumnChunks[ci] = lookups[ci];
1674  }
1675  mBegin = unfiltered_iterator{mColumnChunks, {table->num_rows(), offset}};
1676  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
1677  }
1678  }
1679 
1683  Table(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
1684  : Table(ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset)
1685  {
1686  }
1687 
1688  template <typename Key>
1689  inline arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexToKey()
1690  {
1691  if constexpr (framework::has_type_conditional<is_binding_compatible, Key>(external_index_columns_t{})) {
1692  using IC = framework::pack_element_t<framework::has_type_at_conditional<is_binding_compatible, Key>(external_index_columns_t{}), external_index_columns_t>;
1693  return mColumnChunks[framework::has_type_at<IC>(persistent_columns_t{})];
1694  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<table_t, Key>) {
1695  return nullptr;
1696  } else {
1697  static_assert(framework::always_static_assert_v<Key>, "This table does not have an index to this type");
1698  }
1699  }
1700 
1701  auto& cached_begin()
1702  {
1703  return mBegin;
1704  }
1705 
1706  auto const& cached_begin() const
1707  {
1708  return mBegin;
1709  }
1710 
1711  unfiltered_iterator begin()
1712  {
1713  return unfiltered_iterator(mBegin);
1714  }
1715 
1716  RowViewSentinel end()
1717  {
1718  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
1719  }
1720 
1721  filtered_iterator filtered_begin(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
1722  {
1723  // Note that the FilteredIndexPolicy will never outlive the selection which
1724  // is held by the table, so we are safe passing the bare pointer. If it does it
1725  // means that the iterator on a table is outliving the table itself, which is
1726  // a bad idea.
1727  return filtered_iterator(mColumnChunks, {selection, mTable->num_rows(), mOffset});
1728  }
1729 
1730  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1731  {
1732  return rawIteratorAt(i);
1733  }
1734 
1735  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1736  {
1737  auto it = mBegin;
1738  it.setCursor(i);
1739  return it;
1740  }
1741 
1742  unfiltered_const_iterator begin() const
1743  {
1744  return unfiltered_const_iterator(mBegin);
1745  }
1746 
1747  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
1748  {
1749  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
1750  }
1751 
1753  [[nodiscard]] std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> asArrowTable() const
1754  {
1755  return mTable;
1756  }
1758  auto offset() const
1759  {
1760  return mOffset;
1761  }
1763  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
1764  {
1765  return mTable->num_rows();
1766  }
1767 
1768  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
1769  {
1770  return size();
1771  }
1772 
1775  template <typename... TA>
1776  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
1777  {
1778  mBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
1779  }
1780 
1781  template <typename I>
1782  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
1783  {
1784  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
1785  }
1786 
1787  void bindInternalIndicesExplicit(o2::soa::Binding binding)
1788  {
1789  doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(internal_index_columns_t{}, binding);
1790  }
1791 
1792  template <typename... Cs>
1793  void doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(framework::pack<Cs...>, o2::soa::Binding binding)
1794  {
1795  (static_cast<Cs>(mBegin).setCurrentRaw(binding), ...);
1796  }
1797 
1798  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
1799  {
1800  mBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
1801  }
1802 
1803  template <typename T, typename... Cs>
1804  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T& dest) const
1805  {
1806  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mBegin.getIndexBindings());
1807  }
1808 
1809  template <typename T>
1810  void copyIndexBindings(T& dest) const
1811  {
1812  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
1813  }
1814 
1815  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
1816  {
1817  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
1818  copyIndexBindings(t);
1819  return t;
1820  }
1821 
1822  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
1823  {
1824  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
1825  }
1826 
1827  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
1828  {
1829  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
1830  }
1831 
1832  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
1833  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
1834  {
1835  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
1836  }
1837 
1838  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
1839  {
1840  return self_t{mTable->Slice(start, end - start + 1), start};
1841  }
1842 
1843  auto emptySlice() const
1844  {
1845  return self_t{mTable->Slice(0, 0), 0};
1846  }
1847 
1848  protected:
1850  uint64_t mOffset;
1851 
1852  private:
1853  template <typename T>
1854  arrow::ChunkedArray* lookupColumn()
1855  {
1856  if constexpr (T::persistent::value) {
1857  auto label = T::columnLabel();
1858  return getIndexFromLabel(mTable.get(), label);
1859  } else {
1860  return nullptr;
1861  }
1862  }
1863  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> mTable;
1864  // Cached pointers to the ChunkedArray associated to a column
1865  arrow::ChunkedArray* mColumnChunks[sizeof...(C)];
1867  unfiltered_iterator mBegin;
1869  RowViewSentinel mEnd;
1870 };
1871 
1872 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc, typename T>
1873 struct PackToTable {
1874  static_assert(framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "Not a pack");
1875 };
1876 
1877 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... C>
1878 struct PackToTable<ORIGIN, framework::pack<C...>> {
1879  using table = o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, C...>;
1880 };
1881 
1882 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... T>
1883 struct TableWrap {
1884  using all_columns = framework::concatenated_pack_unique_t<typename T::columns...>;
1885  using table_t = typename PackToTable<ORIGIN, all_columns>::table;
1886 };
1887 
1888 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... T>
1889 struct TableIntersect {
1890  using all_columns = framework::full_intersected_pack_t<typename T::columns...>;
1891  using table_t = typename PackToTable<ORIGIN, all_columns>::table;
1892 };
1893 
1896 template <typename INHERIT>
1897 class TableMetadata
1898 {
1899  public:
1900  static constexpr char const* tableLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
1901  // static constexpr char const (&origin())[5] { return INHERIT::table_t::mOrigin; }
1902  static consteval auto origin() { return INHERIT::table_t::mOrigin; }
1903  static constexpr char const (&description())[16] { return INHERIT::mDescription; }
1904  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType version() { return INHERIT::mVersion; }
1905  static std::string sourceSpec() { return fmt::format("{}/{:s}/{}/{}", INHERIT::mLabel, INHERIT::table_t::mOrigin, INHERIT::mDescription, INHERIT::mVersion); };
1906 };
1907 
1909 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... T>
1910 constexpr auto join(T const&... t)
1911 {
1912  return typename o2::soa::TableWrap<ORIGIN, T...>::table_t(ArrowHelpers::joinTables({t.asArrowTable()...}));
1913 }
1914 
1915 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... T>
1916 constexpr auto concat(T const&... t)
1917 {
1918  return typename o2::soa::TableIntersect<ORIGIN, T...>::table_t(ArrowHelpers::concatTables({t.asArrowTable()...}));
1919 }
1920 
1921 template <typename T1, typename T2>
1922 using ConcatBase = decltype(concat<o2::framework::OriginEnc{"CONC"}>(std::declval<T1>(), std::declval<T2>()));
1923 
1924 void notBoundTable(const char* tableName);
1925 
1926 namespace row_helpers
1927 {
1928 template <typename... Cs>
1929 std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)> getArrowColumns(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>)
1930 {
1931  static_assert(std::conjunction_v<typename Cs::persistent...>, "Arrow columns: only persistent columns accepted (not dynamic and not index ones");
1932  return std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())...};
1933 }
1934 
1935 template <typename... Cs>
1936 std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)> getChunks(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>, uint64_t ci)
1937 {
1938  static_assert(std::conjunction_v<typename Cs::persistent...>, "Arrow chunks: only persistent columns accepted (not dynamic and not index ones");
1939  return std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())->chunk(ci)...};
1940 }
1941 
1942 template <typename T, typename C>
1943 typename C::type getSingleRowPersistentData(arrow::Table* table, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1944 {
1945  if (ci == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() || ai == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max()) {
1946  auto colIterator = static_cast<C>(rowIterator).getIterator();
1947  ci = colIterator.mCurrentChunk;
1948  ai = *(colIterator.mCurrentPos) - colIterator.mFirstIndex;
1949  }
1950  return std::static_pointer_cast<o2::soa::arrow_array_for_t<typename C::type>>(o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, C::columnLabel())->chunk(ci))->raw_values()[ai];
1951 }
1952 
1953 template <typename T, typename C>
1954 typename C::type getSingleRowDynamicData(T& rowIterator, uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1955 {
1956  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
1957  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
1958  }
1959  return rowIterator.template getDynamicColumn<C>();
1960 }
1961 
1962 template <typename T, typename C>
1963 typename C::type getSingleRowIndexData(T& rowIterator, uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1964 {
1965  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
1966  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
1967  }
1968  return rowIterator.template getId<C>();
1969 }
1970 
1971 template <typename T, typename C>
1972 typename C::type getSingleRowData(arrow::Table* table, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = -1, uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1973 {
1974  using decayed = std::decay_t<C>;
1975  if constexpr (decayed::persistent::value) {
1976  return getSingleRowPersistentData<T, C>(table, rowIterator, ci, ai);
1977  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_dynamic_t<decayed>()) {
1978  return getSingleRowDynamicData<T, C>(rowIterator, globalIndex);
1979  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_index_t<decayed>::value) {
1980  return getSingleRowIndexData<T, C>(rowIterator, globalIndex);
1981  } else {
1982  static_assert(!sizeof(decayed*), "Unrecognized column kind"); // A trick to delay static_assert until we actually instantiate this branch
1983  }
1984 }
1985 
1986 template <typename T, typename... Cs>
1987 std::tuple<typename Cs::type...> getRowData(arrow::Table* table, T rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1988 {
1989  return std::make_tuple(getSingleRowData<T, Cs>(table, rowIterator, ci, ai, globalIndex)...);
1990 }
1991 } // namespace row_helpers
1992 } // namespace o2::soa
1993 
1994 namespace o2::aod
1995 {
1996 DECLARE_SOA_ITERATOR_METADATA();
1997 }
1998 
1999 #define DECLARE_SOA_VERSIONING() \
2000  template <typename T> \
2001  consteval int getVersion() \
2002  { \
2003  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_type_with_metadata_v<MetadataTrait<T>>) { \
2004  return MetadataTrait<T>::metadata::version(); \
2005  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_type_with_originals_v<T>) { \
2006  return MetadataTrait<o2::framework::pack_head_t<typename T::originals>>::metadata::version(); \
2007  } else { \
2008  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "Not a versioned type"); \
2009  } \
2010  }
2011 
2012 #define DECLARE_EQUIVALENT_FOR_INDEX(_Base_, _Equiv_) \
2013  template <> \
2014  struct EquivalentIndex<_Base_, _Equiv_> { \
2015  constexpr static bool value = true; \
2016  }
2017 
2018 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
2019  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
2020  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2021  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
2022  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
2023  using type = _Type_; \
2024  using column_t = _Name_; \
2025  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2026  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2027  { \
2028  } \
2029  \
2030  _Name_() = default; \
2031  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2032  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2033  \
2034  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
2035  { \
2036  return *mColumnIterator; \
2037  } \
2038  \
2039  decltype(auto) get() const \
2040  { \
2041  return _Getter_(); \
2042  } \
2043  }; \
2044  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2045  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2046 
2047 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_) \
2048  DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, "f" #_Name_)
2049 
2052 #define MAKEINT(_Size_) uint##_Size_##_t
2053 
2054 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, _Label_) \
2055  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_> { \
2056  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2057  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
2058  using base = o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_>; \
2059  using type = MAKEINT(_Size_); \
2060  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2061  : o2::soa::Column<type, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2062  { \
2063  } \
2064  \
2065  _Name_() = default; \
2066  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2067  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2068  \
2069  decltype(auto) _Getter_##_raw() const \
2070  { \
2071  return *mColumnIterator; \
2072  } \
2073  \
2074  bool _Getter_##_bit(int bit) const \
2075  { \
2076  return (*mColumnIterator & (static_cast<type>(1) << bit)) >> bit; \
2077  } \
2078  }; \
2079  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2080  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<MAKEINT(_Size_)>() }
2081 
2082 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_) \
2083  DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, "f" #_Name_)
2084 
2087 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, _Expression_) \
2088  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
2089  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2090  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
2091  using type = _Type_; \
2092  using column_t = _Name_; \
2093  using spawnable_t = std::true_type; \
2094  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2095  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2096  { \
2097  } \
2098  \
2099  _Name_() = default; \
2100  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2101  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2102  \
2103  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
2104  { \
2105  return *mColumnIterator; \
2106  } \
2107  \
2108  decltype(auto) get() const \
2109  { \
2110  return _Getter_(); \
2111  } \
2112  \
2113  static o2::framework::expressions::Projector Projector() \
2114  { \
2115  return _Expression_; \
2116  } \
2117  }; \
2118  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2119  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2120 
2121 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Expression_) \
2122  DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, "f" #_Name_, _Expression_);
2123 
2142 
2144 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2145  struct _Name_##IdSlice : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice> { \
2146  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2147  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2148  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexSlice" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2149  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>; \
2150  using type = _Type_[2]; \
2151  using column_t = _Name_##IdSlice; \
2152  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2153  _Name_##IdSlice(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2154  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2155  { \
2156  } \
2157  \
2158  _Name_##IdSlice() = default; \
2159  _Name_##IdSlice(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2160  _Name_##IdSlice& operator=(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2161  std::array<_Type_, 2> inline getIds() const \
2162  { \
2163  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2164  } \
2165  \
2166  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2167  { \
2168  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2169  return a[0] >= 0 && a[1] >= 0; \
2170  } \
2171  \
2172  std::array<_Type_, 2> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2173  { \
2174  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2175  return std::array{a[0], a[1]}; \
2176  } \
2177  \
2178  template <typename T> \
2179  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2180  { \
2181  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2182  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2183  } \
2184  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2185  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2186  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2187  } \
2188  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2189  return t->emptySlice(); \
2190  } \
2191  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2192  auto r = t->rawSlice(a[0], a[1]); \
2193  t->copyIndexBindings(r); \
2194  r.bindInternalIndicesTo(t); \
2195  return r; \
2196  } \
2197  \
2198  auto _Getter_() const \
2199  { \
2200  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2201  } \
2202  \
2203  template <typename T> \
2204  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2205  { \
2206  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2207  assert(current != nullptr); \
2208  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2209  return true; \
2210  } \
2211  return false; \
2212  } \
2213  \
2214  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2215  { \
2216  this->mBinding = current; \
2217  return true; \
2218  } \
2219  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2220  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2221  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2222  };
2223 
2224 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2225 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2226 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2227 
2229 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2230  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \
2231  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2232  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2233  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2234  using base = o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>; \
2235  using type = std::vector<_Type_>; \
2236  using column_t = _Name_##Ids; \
2237  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2238  _Name_##Ids(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2239  : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2240  { \
2241  } \
2242  \
2243  _Name_##Ids() = default; \
2244  _Name_##Ids(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2245  _Name_##Ids& operator=(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2246  \
2247  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2248  { \
2249  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2250  } \
2251  \
2252  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2253  { \
2254  return *mColumnIterator; \
2255  } \
2256  \
2257  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2258  { \
2259  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2260  } \
2261  \
2262  template <typename T> \
2263  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2264  { \
2265  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2266  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2267  } \
2268  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2269  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2270  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2271  } \
2272  return getIterators<T>(); \
2273  } \
2274  \
2275  template <typename T> \
2276  auto filtered_##_Getter_##_as() const \
2277  { \
2278  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2279  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2280  } \
2281  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2282  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2283  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2284  } \
2285  return getFilteredIterators<T>(); \
2286  } \
2287  \
2288  template <typename T> \
2289  auto getIterators() const \
2290  { \
2291  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2292  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2293  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2294  } \
2295  return result; \
2296  } \
2297  \
2298  template <typename T> \
2299  std::vector<typename T::iterator> getFilteredIterators() const \
2300  { \
2301  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) { \
2302  auto result = std::vector<typename T::iterator>(); \
2303  for (auto const& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2304  auto pos = mBinding.get<T>()->isInSelectedRows(i); \
2305  if (pos > 0) { \
2306  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->iteratorAt(pos)); \
2307  } \
2308  } \
2309  return result; \
2310  } else { \
2311  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "T is not a Filtered type"); \
2312  } \
2313  return {}; \
2314  } \
2315  \
2316  auto _Getter_() const \
2317  { \
2318  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2319  } \
2320  \
2321  template <typename T> \
2322  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2323  { \
2324  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2325  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2326  } \
2327  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2328  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2329  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2330  } \
2331  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2332  } \
2333  \
2334  template <typename T> \
2335  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2336  { \
2337  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2338  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2339  } \
2340  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2341  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2342  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2343  } \
2344  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2345  } \
2346  \
2347  auto _Getter_first() const \
2348  { \
2349  return _Getter_##_first_as<binding_t>(); \
2350  } \
2351  \
2352  auto _Getter_last() const \
2353  { \
2354  return _Getter_##_last_as<binding_t>(); \
2355  } \
2356  \
2357  template <typename T> \
2358  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2359  { \
2360  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2361  assert(current != nullptr); \
2362  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2363  return true; \
2364  } \
2365  return false; \
2366  } \
2367  \
2368  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2369  { \
2370  this->mBinding = current; \
2371  return true; \
2372  } \
2373  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2374  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2375  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2376  };
2377 
2378 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2379 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2380 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2381 
2383 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2384  struct _Name_##Id : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id> { \
2385  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2386  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2387  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndex" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2388  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>; \
2389  using type = _Type_; \
2390  using column_t = _Name_##Id; \
2391  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2392  _Name_##Id(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2393  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2394  { \
2395  } \
2396  \
2397  _Name_##Id() = default; \
2398  _Name_##Id(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2399  _Name_##Id& operator=(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2400  type inline getId() const \
2401  { \
2402  return _Getter_##Id(); \
2403  } \
2404  \
2405  type _Getter_##Id() const \
2406  { \
2407  return *mColumnIterator; \
2408  } \
2409  \
2410  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2411  { \
2412  return *mColumnIterator >= 0; \
2413  } \
2414  \
2415  template <typename T> \
2416  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2417  { \
2418  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2419  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2420  } \
2421  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2422  o2::soa::accessingInvalidIndexFor(#_Getter_); \
2423  } \
2424  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2425  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2426  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2427  } \
2428  return t->rawIteratorAt(*mColumnIterator); \
2429  } \
2430  \
2431  auto _Getter_() const \
2432  { \
2433  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2434  } \
