2435  \
2436  template <typename T> \
2437  bool setCurrent(T* current) \
2438  { \
2439  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2440  assert(current != nullptr); \
2441  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2442  return true; \
2443  } \
2444  return false; \
2445  } \
2446  \
2447  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2448  { \
2449  this->mBinding = current; \
2450  return true; \
2451  } \
2452  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2453  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2454  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2455  }; \
2456  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_##Id { "fIndex" #_Table_ _Suffix_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_##Id>(), \
2457  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2458 
2459 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2460 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2461 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2462 
2464 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
2465  struct _Name_##Id : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id> { \
2466  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2467  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndex" _Label_; \
2468  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>; \
2469  using type = _Type_; \
2470  using column_t = _Name_##Id; \
2471  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2472  _Name_##Id(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2473  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2474  { \
2475  } \
2476  \
2477  _Name_##Id() = default; \
2478  _Name_##Id(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2479  _Name_##Id& operator=(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2480  type inline getId() const \
2481  { \
2482  return _Getter_##Id(); \
2483  } \
2484  \
2485  type _Getter_##Id() const \
2486  { \
2487  return *mColumnIterator; \
2488  } \
2489  \
2490  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2491  { \
2492  return *mColumnIterator >= 0; \
2493  } \
2494  \
2495  template <typename T> \
2496  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2497  { \
2498  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2499  o2::soa::accessingInvalidIndexFor(#_Getter_); \
2500  } \
2501  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2502  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2503  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2504  } \
2505  return t->rawIteratorAt(*mColumnIterator); \
2506  } \
2507  \
2508  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2509  { \
2510  this->mBinding = current; \
2511  return true; \
2512  } \
2513  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2514  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2515  }; \
2516  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_##Id { "fIndex" _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_##Id>(), \
2517  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2518 
2519 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, #_Name_)
2521 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
2522  struct _Name_##IdSlice : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice> { \
2523  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2524  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexSlice" _Label_; \
2525  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>; \
2526  using type = _Type_[2]; \
2527  using column_t = _Name_##IdSlice; \
2528  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2529  _Name_##IdSlice(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2530  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2531  { \
2532  } \
2533  \
2534  _Name_##IdSlice() = default; \
2535  _Name_##IdSlice(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2536  _Name_##IdSlice& operator=(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2537  std::array<_Type_, 2> inline getIds() const \
2538  { \
2539  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2540  } \
2541  \
2542  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2543  { \
2544  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2545  return a[0] >= 0 && a[1] >= 0; \
2546  } \
2547  \
2548  std::array<_Type_, 2> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2549  { \
2550  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2551  return std::array{a[0], a[1]}; \
2552  } \
2553  \
2554  template <typename T> \
2555  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2556  { \
2557  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2558  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2559  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2560  } \
2561  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2562  return t->emptySlice(); \
2563  } \
2564  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2565  auto r = t->rawSlice(a[0], a[1]); \
2566  t->copyIndexBindings(r); \
2567  r.bindInternalIndicesTo(t); \
2568  return r; \
2569  } \
2570  \
2571  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2572  { \
2573  this->mBinding = current; \
2574  return true; \
2575  } \
2576  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2577  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2578  };
2579 
2580 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, "_" #_Name_)
2582 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
2583  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \
2584  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2585  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" _Label_; \
2586  using base = o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>; \
2587  using type = std::vector<_Type_>; \
2588  using column_t = _Name_##Ids; \
2589  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2590  _Name_##Ids(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2591  : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2592  { \
2593  } \
2594  \
2595  _Name_##Ids() = default; \
2596  _Name_##Ids(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2597  _Name_##Ids& operator=(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2598  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2599  { \
2600  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2601  } \
2602  \
2603  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2604  { \
2605  return *mColumnIterator; \
2606  } \
2607  \
2608  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2609  { \
2610  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2611  } \
2612  \
2613  template <typename T> \
2614  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2615  { \
2616  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2617  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2618  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2619  } \
2620  return getIterators<T>(); \
2621  } \
2622  \
2623  template <typename T> \
2624  auto getIterators() const \
2625  { \
2626  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2627  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2628  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2629  } \
2630  return result; \
2631  } \
2632  \
2633  template <typename T> \
2634  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2635  { \
2636  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2637  } \
2638  \
2639  template <typename T> \
2640  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2641  { \
2642  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2643  } \
2644  \
2645  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2646  { \
2647  this->mBinding = current; \
2648  return true; \
2649  } \
2650  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2651  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2652  };
2653 
2654 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, "_" #_Name_)
2655 
2684 #define DECLARE_SOA_DYNAMIC_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, ...) \
2685  struct _Name_##Callback { \
2686  static inline constexpr auto getLambda() { return __VA_ARGS__; } \
2687  }; \
2688  \
2689  struct _Name_##Helper { \
2690  using callable_t = decltype(o2::framework::FunctionMetadata(std::declval<decltype(_Name_##Callback::getLambda())>())); \
2691  using return_type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2692  }; \
2693  template <typename... Bindings> \
2694  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>> { \
2695  using base = o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>>; \
2696  using helper = _Name_##Helper; \
2697  using callback_holder_t = _Name_##Callback; \
2698  using callable_t = helper::callable_t; \
2699  using callback_t = callable_t::type; \
2700  \
2701  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) \
2702  { \
2703  } \
2704  _Name_() = default; \
2705  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2706  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2707  static constexpr const char* mLabel = #_Name_; \
2708  using type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2709  \
2710  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2711  type _Getter_(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2712  { \
2713  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2714  } \
2715  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2716  type getDynamicValue(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2717  { \
2718  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2719  } \
2720  \
2721  type get() const \
2722  { \
2723  return _Getter_(); \
2724  } \
2725  \
2726  template <size_t... Is, typename... FreeArgs> \
2727  type boundGetter(std::integer_sequence<size_t, Is...>&&, FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2728  { \
2729  return __VA_ARGS__((**std::get<Is>(boundIterators))..., freeArgs...); \
2730  } \
2731  \
2732  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<Bindings...>; \
2733  std::tuple<o2::soa::ColumnIterator<typename Bindings::type> const*...> boundIterators; \
2734  }
2735 
2736 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, ...) \
2737  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2738  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, __VA_ARGS__>; \
2739  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}>; \
2740  \
2741  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2742  struct _Name_##Metadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##Metadata<ORIGIN>> { \
2743  using table_t = _Name_##From<ORIGIN>; \
2744  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = _Version_; \
2745  static constexpr char const* mLabel = _Label_; \
2746  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2747  }; \
2748  \
2749  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN> \
2750  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_##From<ORIGIN>> { \
2751  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata<ORIGIN>; \
2752  }; \
2753  \
2754  template <> \
2755  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_> { \
2756  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata<o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}>; \
2757  };
2758 
2759 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2760  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, 0, __VA_ARGS__);
2761 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE(_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2762  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, __VA_ARGS__);
2763 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, ...) \
2764  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__);
2765 
2766 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2767  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2768  struct _Name_##ExtensionFrom : o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, __VA_ARGS__> { \
2769  using base_t = o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, __VA_ARGS__>; \
2770  _Name_##ExtensionFrom(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0) : o2::soa::Table<ORIGIN, __VA_ARGS__>(table, offset){}; \
2771  _Name_##ExtensionFrom(_Name_##ExtensionFrom const&) = default; \
2772  _Name_##ExtensionFrom(_Name_##ExtensionFrom&&) = default; \
2773  using expression_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2774  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<_Name_##ExtensionFrom<ORIGIN>, _Name_##ExtensionFrom<ORIGIN>>; \
2775  using const_iterator = iterator; \
2776  }; \
2777  using _Name_##Extension = _Name_##ExtensionFrom<o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}>; \
2778  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN> \
2779  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::Join<_Name_##ExtensionFrom<ORIGIN>, _Table_>; \
2780  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}>; \
2781  \
2782  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2783  struct _Name_##ExtensionMetadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##ExtensionMetadata<ORIGIN>> { \
2784  using table_t = _Name_##ExtensionFrom<ORIGIN>; \
2785  using base_table_t = _Table_; \
2786  using expression_pack_t = typename _Name_##ExtensionFrom<ORIGIN>::expression_pack_t; \
2787  using originals = soa::originals_pack_t<_Table_>; \
2788  using sources = originals; \
2789  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = getVersion<_Table_>(); \
2790  static constexpr char const* mLabel = #_Name_ "Extension"; \
2791  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2792  }; \
2793  \
2794  template <> \
2795  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_##Extension> { \
2796  using metadata = _Name_##ExtensionMetadata<o2::framework::OriginEnc{"DYN"}>; \
2797  };
2798 
2799 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, ...) \
2800  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, "DYN", _Description_, __VA_ARGS__)
2801 
2802 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, ...) \
2803  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, "AOD", _Description_, __VA_ARGS__)
2804 
2805 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Exclusive_, ...) \
2806  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2807  struct _Name_##From : o2::soa::IndexTable<ORIGIN, _Key_, __VA_ARGS__> { \
2808  using base_t = o2::soa::IndexTable<ORIGIN, _Key_, __VA_ARGS__>; \
2809  _Name_##From(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0) : o2::soa::IndexTable<ORIGIN, _Key_, __VA_ARGS__>(table, offset){}; \
2810  _Name_##From(_Name_##From const&) = default; \
2811  _Name_##From(_Name_##From&&) = default; \
2812  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<_Name_##From<ORIGIN>, _Name_##From<ORIGIN>>; \
2813  using const_iterator = iterator; \
2814  }; \
2815  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}>; \
2816  \
2817  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN = o2::framework::OriginEnc{_Origin_}> \
2818  struct _Name_##Metadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##Metadata<ORIGIN>> { \
2819  using table_t = _Name_##From<ORIGIN>; \
2820  using Key = _Key_; \
2821  using index_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2822  using originals = decltype(soa::extractBindings(index_pack_t{})); \
2823  using sources = typename _Name_##From<ORIGIN>::sources_t; \
2824  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = 0; \
2825  static constexpr char const* mLabel = #_Name_; \
2826  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2827  static constexpr bool exclusive = _Exclusive_; \
2828  }; \
2829  \
2830  template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN> \
2831  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_##From<ORIGIN>> { \
2832  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata<ORIGIN>; \
2833  };
2834 
2835 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2836  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
2837 
2838 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2839  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
2840 
2841 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2842  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
2843 
2844 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2845  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
2846 
2847 namespace o2::soa
2848 {
2849 template <typename T>
2850 class FilteredBase;
2851 
2852 template <typename... Ts>
2853 struct Join : TableWrap<o2::framework::OriginEnc{"JOIN"}, Ts...>::table_t {
2854  using base = typename TableWrap<o2::framework::OriginEnc{"JOIN"}, Ts...>::table_t;
2855  using originals = originals_pack_t<Ts...>;
2856 
2857  Join(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
2858  : base{ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
2859  {
2860  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2861  }
2862  using base::bindExternalIndices;
2863  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
2864 
2865  using self_t = Join<Ts...>;
2866  using table_t = base;
2867  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
2868  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<Join<Ts...>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2869  using const_iterator = iterator;
2870  using unfiltered_iterator = iterator;
2871  using unfiltered_const_iterator = const_iterator;
2872  using filtered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Filtered<Join<Ts...>>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2873  using filtered_const_iterator = filtered_iterator;
2874 
2875  iterator begin()
2876  {
2877  return iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2878  }
2879 
2880  const_iterator begin() const
2881  {
2882  return const_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2883  }
2884 
2885  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2886  {
2887  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
2888  }
2889 
2890  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2891  {
2892  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
2893  }
2894 
2895  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
2896  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
2897  {
2898  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
2899  }
2900 
2901  iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2902  {
2903  auto it = iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2904  it.setCursor(i);
2905  return it;
2906  }
2907 
2908  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2909  {
2910  return rawIteratorAt(i);
2911  }
2912 
2913  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
2914  {
2915  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(start, end - start + 1)}, start};
2916  }
2917 
2918  auto emptySlice() const
2919  {
2920  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(0, 0)}, 0};
2921  }
2922 
2923  template <typename T>
2924  static consteval bool contains()
2925  {
2926  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
2927  return contains(typename T::originals{});
2928  } else {
2929  return framework::has_type<T>(originals{});
2930  }
2931  }
2932 
2933  template <typename... TTs>
2934  static constexpr bool contains(framework::pack<TTs...>)
2935  {
2936  return (contains<TTs>() || ...);
2937  }
2938 };
2939 
2940 template <typename T1, typename T2>
2941 struct Concat : ConcatBase<T1, T2> {
2942  Concat(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> t1, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> t2, uint64_t offset = 0)
2943  : ConcatBase<T1, T2>{ArrowHelpers::concatTables({t1, t2}), offset}
2944  {
2945  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2946  }
2947  Concat(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
2948  : ConcatBase<T1, T2>{ArrowHelpers::concatTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
2949  {
2950  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2951  }
2952 
2953  using base = ConcatBase<T1, T2>;
2954  using originals = framework::concatenated_pack_t<originals_pack_t<T1>, originals_pack_t<T2>>;
2955 
2956  using base::bindExternalIndices;
2957  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
2958 
2959  // FIXME: can be remove when we do the same treatment we did for Join to Concatenate
2960  using left_t = T1;
2961  using right_t = T2;
2962  using table_t = ConcatBase<T1, T2>;
2963  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
2964 
2965  using iterator = typename table_t::template RowView<Concat<T1, T2>, T1, T2>;
2966  using filtered_iterator = typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Concat<T1, T2>, T1, T2>;
2967 };
2968 
2969 template <typename T>
2970 using is_soa_join_t = framework::is_specialization<T, soa::Join>;
2971 
2972 template <typename T>
2973 using is_soa_concat_t = framework::is_specialization<T, soa::Concat>;
2974 
2975 template <typename T>
2976 inline constexpr bool is_soa_join_v = is_soa_join_t<T>::value;
2977 
2978 template <typename T>
2979 inline constexpr bool is_soa_concat_v = is_soa_concat_t<T>::value;
2980 
2981 template <typename T>
2982 class FilteredBase : public T
2983 {
2984  public:
2985  using self_t = FilteredBase<T>;
2986  using originals = originals_pack_t<T>;
2987  using table_t = typename T::table_t;
2988  using persistent_columns_t = typename T::persistent_columns_t;
2989  using external_index_columns_t = typename T::external_index_columns_t;
2990 
2991  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<FilteredBase<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2992  using unfiltered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<FilteredBase<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2993  using const_iterator = iterator;
2994 
2995  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
2996  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
2997  mSelectedRows{getSpan(selection)}
2998  {
2999  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3000  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3001  }
3002  resetRanges();
3003  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3004  }
3005 
3006  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3007  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
3008  mSelectedRowsCache{std::move(selection)},
3009  mCached{true}
3010  {
3011  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
3012  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3013  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3014  }
3015  resetRanges();
3016  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3017  }
3018 
3019  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3020  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
3021  mSelectedRows{selection}
3022  {
3023  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3024  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3025  }
3026  resetRanges();
3027  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3028  }
3029 
3030  iterator begin()
3031  {
3032  return iterator(mFilteredBegin);
3033  }
3034 
3035  const_iterator begin() const
3036  {
3037  return const_iterator(mFilteredBegin);
3038  }
3039 
3040  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3041  {
3042  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{mFilteredBegin};
3043  it.setCursor(i);
3044  return it;
3045  }
3046 
3047  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
3048  {
3049  return RowViewSentinel{*mFilteredEnd};
3050  }
3051 
3052  auto& cached_begin()
3053  {
3054  return mFilteredBegin;
3055  }
3056 
3057  auto const& cached_begin() const
3058  {
3059  return mFilteredBegin;
3060  }
3061 
3062  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3063  {
3064  return mFilteredBegin + i;
3065  }
3066 
3067  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
3068  {
3069  return mSelectedRows.size();
3070  }
3071 
3072  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
3073  {
3074  return table_t::asArrowTable()->num_rows();
3075  }
3076 
3077  auto const& getSelectedRows() const
3078  {
3079  return mSelectedRows;
3080  }
3081 
3082  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3083  {
3084  SelectionVector newSelection;
3085  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3086  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3087  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3088  }
3089 
3090  auto emptySlice() const
3091  {
3092  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3093  }
3094 
3095  static inline auto getSpan(gandiva::Selection const& sel)
3096  {
3097  if (sel == nullptr) {
3098  return gsl::span<int64_t const>{};
3099  }
3100  auto array = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::Int64Array>(sel->ToArray());
3101  auto start = array->raw_values();
3102  auto stop = start + array->length();
3103  return gsl::span{start, stop};
3104  }
3105 
3108  template <typename... TA>
3109  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
3110  {
3111  table_t::bindExternalIndices(current...);
3112  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
3113  }
3114 
3115  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
3116  {
3117  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
3118  }
3119 
3120  template <typename I>
3121  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
3122  {
3123  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
3124  }
3125 
3126  template <typename T1, typename... Cs>
3127  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T1& dest) const
3128  {
3129  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mFilteredBegin.getIndexBindings());
3130  }
3131 
3132  template <typename T1>
3133  void copyIndexBindings(T1& dest) const
3134  {
3135  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
3136  }
3137 
3138  template <typename T1>
3139  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3140  {
3141  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3142  }
3143 
3144  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3145  {
3146  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3147  }
3148 
3149  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3150  {
3151  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3152  }
3153 
3154  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3155  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3156  {
3157  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3158  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3159  } else {
3160  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3161  }
3162  }
3163 
3164  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3165  {
3166  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3167  copyIndexBindings(t);
3168  return t;
3169  }
3170 
3171  int isInSelectedRows(int i) const
3172  {
3173  auto locate = std::find(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), i);
3174  if (locate == mSelectedRows.end()) {
3175  return -1;
3176  }
3177  return static_cast<int>(std::distance(mSelectedRows.begin(), locate));
3178  }
3179 
3180  void sumWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3181  {
3182  mCached = true;
3183  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3184  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3185  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3186  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3187  resetRanges();
3188  }
3189 
3190  void intersectWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3191  {
3192  mCached = true;
3193  SelectionVector intersection;
3194  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3195  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3196  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3197  resetRanges();
3198  }
3199 
3200  void sumWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3201  {
3202  mCached = true;
3203  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3204  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3205  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3206  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3207  resetRanges();
3208  }
3209 
3210  void intersectWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3211  {
3212  mCached = true;
3213  SelectionVector intersection;
3214  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3215  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3216  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3217  resetRanges();
3218  }
3219 
3220  bool isCached() const
3221  {
3222  return mCached;
3223  }
3224 
3225  private:
3226  void resetRanges()
3227  {
3228  if (mCached) {
3229  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
3230  }
3231  mFilteredEnd.reset(new RowViewSentinel{static_cast<int64_t>(mSelectedRows.size())});
3232  if (tableSize() == 0) {
3233  mFilteredBegin = *mFilteredEnd;
3234  } else {
3235  mFilteredBegin.resetSelection(mSelectedRows);
3236  }
3237  }
3238 
3239  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
3240  SelectionVector mSelectedRowsCache;
3241  bool mCached = false;
3242  iterator mFilteredBegin;
3243  std::shared_ptr<RowViewSentinel> mFilteredEnd;
3244 };
3245 
3246 template <typename T>
3247 class Filtered : public FilteredBase<T>
3248 {
3249  public:
3250  using base_t = T;
3251  using self_t = Filtered<T>;
3252  using table_t = typename FilteredBase<T>::table_t;
3253  using originals = originals_pack_t<T>;
3254 
3255  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Filtered<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3256  using unfiltered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<Filtered<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3257  using const_iterator = iterator;
3258 
3259  iterator begin()
3260  {
3261  return iterator(this->cached_begin());
3262  }
3263 
3264  const_iterator begin() const
3265  {
3266  return const_iterator(this->cached_begin());
3267  }
3268 
3269  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3270  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3271 
3272  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3273  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3274 
3275  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3276  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3277 
3278  Filtered<T> operator+(SelectionVector const& selection)
3279  {
3280  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3281  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3282  return copy;
3283  }
3284 
3285  Filtered<T> operator+(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3286  {
3287  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3288  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3289  return copy;
3290  }
3291 
3292  Filtered<T> operator+(Filtered<T> const& other)
3293  {
3294  return operator+(other.getSelectedRows());
3295  }
3296 
3297  Filtered<T> operator+=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3298  {
3299  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3300  return *this;
3301  }
3302 
3303  Filtered<T> operator+=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3304  {
3305  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3306  return *this;
3307  }
3308 
3309  Filtered<T> operator+=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3310  {
3311  return operator+=(other.getSelectedRows());
3312  }
3313 
3314  Filtered<T> operator*(SelectionVector const& selection)
3315  {
3316  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3317  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3318  return copy;
3319  }
3320 
3321  Filtered<T> operator*(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3322  {
3323  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3324  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3325  return copy;
3326  }
3327 
3328  Filtered<T> operator*(Filtered<T> const& other)
3329  {
3330  return operator*(other.getSelectedRows());
3331  }
3332 
3333  Filtered<T> operator*=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3334  {
3335  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3336  return *this;
3337  }
3338 
3339  Filtered<T> operator*=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3340  {
3341  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3342  return *this;
3343  }
3344 
3345  Filtered<T> operator*=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3346  {
3347  return operator*=(other.getSelectedRows());
3348  }
3349 
3350  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3351  {
3352  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3353  it.setCursor(i);
3354  return it;
3355  }
3356 
3357  using FilteredBase<T>::getSelectedRows;
3358 
3359  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3360  {
3361  SelectionVector newSelection;
3362  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3363  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3364  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3365  }
3366 
3367  auto emptySlice() const
3368  {
3369  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3370  }
3371 
3372  template <typename T1>
3373  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3374  {
3375  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3376  }
3377 
3378  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3379  {
3380  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3381  }
3382 
3383  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3384  {
3385  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3386  }
3387 
3388  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3389  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3390  {
3391  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3392  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3393  } else {
3394  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3395  }
3396  }
3397 
3398  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3399  {
3400  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3401  copyIndexBindings(t);
3402  return t;
3403  }
3404 };
3405 
3406 template <typename T>
3407 class Filtered<Filtered<T>> : public FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>
3408 {
3409  public:
3410  using self_t = Filtered<Filtered<T>>;
3411  using base_t = T;
3412  using table_t = typename FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>::table_t;
3413  using originals = originals_pack_t<T>;
3414  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Filtered<Filtered<T>>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3415  using unfiltered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<Filtered<Filtered<T>>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3416  using const_iterator = iterator;
3417 
3418  iterator begin()
3419  {
3420  return iterator(this->cached_begin());
3421  }
3422 
3423  const_iterator begin() const
3424  {
3425  return const_iterator(this->cached_begin());
3426  }
3427 
3428  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3429  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), selection, offset)
3430  {
3431  for (auto& table : tables) {
3432  *this *= table;
3433  }
3434  }
3435 
3436  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3437  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset)
3438  {
3439  for (auto& table : tables) {
3440  *this *= table;
3441  }
3442  }
3443 
3444  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3445  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), selection, offset)
3446  {
3447  for (auto& table : tables) {
3448  *this *= table;
3449  }
3450  }
3451 
3452  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(SelectionVector const& selection)
3453  {
3454  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3455  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3456  return copy;
3457  }
3458 
3459  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3460  {
3461  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3462  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3463  return copy;
3464  }
3465 
3466  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(Filtered<T> const& other)
3467  {
3468  return operator+(other.getSelectedRows());
3469  }
3470 
3471  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3472  {
3473  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3474  return *this;
3475  }
3476 
3477  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3478  {
3479  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3480  return *this;
3481  }
3482 
3483  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3484  {
3485  return operator+=(other.getSelectedRows());
3486  }
3487 
3488  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(SelectionVector const& selection)
3489  {
3490  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3491  copy.intersectionWithSelection(selection);
3492  return copy;
3493  }
3494 
3495  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3496  {
3497  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3498  copy.intersectionWithSelection(selection);
3499  return copy;
3500  }
3501 
3502  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(Filtered<T> const& other)
3503  {
3504  return operator*(other.getSelectedRows());
3505  }
3506 
3507  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3508  {
3509  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3510  return *this;
3511  }
3512 
3513  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3514  {
3515  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3516  return *this;
3517  }
3518 
3519  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3520  {
3521  return operator*=(other.getSelectedRows());
3522  }
3523 
3524  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3525  {
3526  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3527  it.setCursor(i);
3528  return it;
3529  }
3530 
3531  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3532  {
3533  SelectionVector newSelection;
3534  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3535  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3536  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3537  }
3538 
3539  auto emptySlice() const
3540  {
3541  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3542  }
3543 
3544  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3545  {
3546  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3547  }
3548 
3549  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3550  {
3551  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3552  }
3553 
3554  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3555  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3556  {
3557  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3558  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3559  } else {
3560  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3561  }
3562  }
3563 
3564  private:
3565  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> extractTablesFromFiltered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>& tables)
3566  {
3567  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> outTables;
3568  for (auto& table : tables) {
3569  outTables.push_back(table.asArrowTable());
3570  }
3571  return outTables;
3572  }
3573 };
3574 
3580 template <o2::framework::OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename Key, typename H, typename... Ts>
3581 struct IndexTable : Table<ORIGIN, soa::Index<>, H, Ts...> {
3582  using base_t = Table<ORIGIN, soa::Index<>, H, Ts...>;
3583  using table_t = base_t;
3584  using safe_base_t = Table<ORIGIN, H, Ts...>;
3585  using indexing_t = Key;
3586  using first_t = typename H::binding_t;
3587  using rest_t = framework::pack<typename Ts::binding_t...>;
3588  using sources_t = originals_pack_t<Key, first_t, typename Ts::binding_t...>;
3589 
3590  IndexTable(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
3591  : base_t{table, offset}
3592  {
3593  }
3594 
3595  IndexTable(IndexTable const&) = default;
3596  IndexTable(IndexTable&&) = default;
3597  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable const&) = default;
3598  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable&&) = default;
3599 
3600  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<IndexTable<ORIGIN, Key, H, Ts...>, IndexTable<ORIGIN, Key, H, Ts...>>;
3601  using const_iterator = iterator;
3602 };
3603 
3604 template <typename T>
3605 inline constexpr bool is_soa_index_table_v = soa::is_base_of_template_origin_v<soa::IndexTable, T>;
3606 
3607 template <typename T, bool APPLY>
3608 struct SmallGroupsBase : public Filtered<T> {
3609  static constexpr bool applyFilters = APPLY;
3610  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3611  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3612 
3613  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3614  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3615 
3616  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3617  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3618 };
3619 
3620 template <typename T>
3621 using SmallGroups = SmallGroupsBase<T, true>;
3622 
3623 template <typename T>
3624 using SmallGroupsUnfiltered = SmallGroupsBase<T, false>;
3625 
3626 template <typename T>
3627 struct is_smallgroups_t {
